note: Phase 2 trust-boundary control. Every Supabase Edge Function directory must be classified by exposure class. `verifyJwt` records the reviewed gateway JWT requirement; `scripts/governance/check-edge-function-exposure.mjs` fails CI when supabase/config.toml drifts from this manifest. Public-token functions MUST document an internalGuard. Service-only functions MUST document and implement a recognizable service/shared-token guard. Privileged-role functions MUST reference a recognizable role guard.

classes.public-token: Reachable without a user session. Protected by a per-resource token, signed link, shared secret, or is intentionally public. MUST document an internalGuard.
classes.authenticated-user: Requires a valid Supabase user JWT. No additional role is required beyond authentication.
classes.privileged-role: Requires a valid user JWT and an internal role/capability check (admin, management, logistics, department scope, etc.).
classes.service-only: Invoked by pg_cron, database triggers, or trusted server code with the service role. Not intended for browser callers. When verifyJwt=false it MUST verify the service-role secret or an equivalent internal guard.

apply-flex-status.internalGuard: Uses requireAdminOrManagement before processing workflow status changes or writing flex_status_log rows.

archive-to-flex.internalGuard: Uses requireAdminOrManagement before reading job documents, creating signed URLs, uploading to Flex, or deleting archived documents.

auto-send-timesheet-reminders.internalGuard: Distinguishes service_role (pg_cron) from user callers and enforces a profile role check before sending.

backfill-flex-doc-tecnica.internalGuard: Uses requireAdminOrManagement before scanning Flex trees or inserting doc_tecnica flex_folders rows.

background-job-deletion.internalGuard: Requires a service-role bearer/apikey via requireServiceRoleRequest before starting background deletion.

cleanup-corporate-email-images.internalGuard: timingSafeEqual comparison of the bearer/apikey against SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY; returns 403 otherwise.

create-flex-folders.internalGuard: Uses requireAdminOrManagement before creating Flex folder trees, writing tour/flex_folders rows, or broadcasting activity.

csp-report.internalGuard: Browser report endpoint with no credentials. Applies a durable service-role rate limit, reads a size-bounded body, normalizes reports, strips query strings, and writes only normalized records via the service role. Returns 204 with no data.

delete-public-artist-rider.internalGuard: Festival artist form access token validated against the submission before any storage delete; guarded by durable ingress and token/document scoped rate limits.

enrich-artist-metadata.internalGuard: Uses requireAuthenticatedRole to restrict callers to admin/management/logistics before resolving or caching any Wikidata/Wikipedia metadata.

evaluate-achievements.internalGuard: Requires a service-role bearer/apikey via requireServiceRoleRequest before running achievement evaluation RPCs.

fetch-flex-contact-info.internalGuard: Uses the shared HTTP wrapper and bounded JSON parsing; validates the caller JWT and requires admin/management before fetching Flex contact key-info.

fetch-flex-image.internalGuard: Uses the shared HTTP wrapper; validates the caller JWT before proxying allowlisted Flex image IDs and returns authenticated-user private cache headers.

fetch-flex-inventory-model.internalGuard: Uses the shared HTTP wrapper and bounded JSON parsing; validates the caller JWT and requires admin/management before fetching Flex inventory model details.

fetch-flex-motor-units.internalGuard: Uses the shared HTTP wrapper, validates the caller JWT, requires admin/management, and reads only the fixed allowlist of motor serial-unit models from Flex.

fetch-flex-material-report.internalGuard: Uses the shared HTTP wrapper and bounded JSON parsing; requires requireAuthenticatedRole (admin/management/house_tech) before resolving a job's Flex quote element and fetching its materials-list report.

get-google-maps-key.internalGuard: Verifies the caller JWT with auth.getUser, enforces GOOGLE_MAPS_ALLOWED_ROLES, and consumes a per-user/global daily quota before returning a restricted key.

get-mapbox-token.internalGuard: Applies a durable client-bucket rate limit and returns only the publishable MAPBOX_PUBLIC_TOKEN, which is URL-restricted at Mapbox; no secret material is exposed.

get-secret.internalGuard: Direct secret delivery is disabled: valid authenticated callers are audited and receive HTTP 410, while missing/invalid auth receives 401.

image-proxy.internalGuard: Retired endpoint: shared HTTP wrapper returns 410 without parsing or fetching caller-controlled URLs.

import-users.internalGuard: Uses requireAdminOrManagement before accepting the CSV upload or creating/updating users with the auth admin API.

job-hoja-de-ruta-link.internalGuard: HMAC-signed job-scoped links expire, pass durable ingress and token-scoped rate limits, then resolve the latest Hoja de Ruta and redirect only to a short-lived storage signed URL.

manage-flex-crew-assignments.internalGuard: Uses requireAdminOrManagement before adding/removing Flex crew resources or mutating flex_crew_assignments.

notify-staffing-cancellation.internalGuard: Uses the shared HTTP wrapper and bounded JSON parsing; browser callers must be authenticated admin/management, while service-role calls remain available for internal automation.

persist-flex-elements.internalGuard: Uses the shared HTTP wrapper and bounded JSON parsing; validates the caller JWT, requires admin/management, and validates created Flex element records before service-role persistence.

parse-la-session.internalGuard: Uses the shared HTTP wrapper and bounded JSON parsing; validates the caller JWT and requires admin/management/house_tech via requireAuthenticatedRole before decrypting an uploaded L-Acoustics session (.nwm via NWM_AES_KEY/IV, .xmlp via SV_AES_KEY/IV). Decryption keys are deployment secrets (each format returns 503 when its secret is unset); the file and decrypted XML are processed transiently and never persisted.

recalc-timesheet-amount.internalGuard: Requires a service-role bearer/apikey via requireServiceRoleRequest before persisting recalculated timesheet amounts.

secure-flex-api.internalGuard: Uses the shared HTTP wrapper and bounded JSON parsing; validates the caller JWT, requires admin/management, and preserves the Flex endpoint/method/header allowlists before proxying.

security-audit.internalGuard: Intentionally accepts app audit events via gateway JWT, validates bounded action/resource/severity payloads, sanitizes metadata, prefers the authenticated JWT user, and returns no stored data.

send-expense-notification.internalGuard: Database trigger invokes with the service-role bearer token; function performs a timing-safe compare against SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY before sending.

send-job-payout-email.internalGuard: Validates the caller JWT with auth.getUser and requires profiles.role to be admin or management before reading payout overrides or sending email.

send-job-whatsapp-message.internalGuard: Uses the shared HTTP wrapper and bounded JSON parsing; validates the caller JWT with auth.getUser and requires admin or production department plus a WAHA endpoint before sending.

send-password-reset.internalGuard: Password recovery endpoint intentionally accepts anon/session gateway JWTs, normalizes all responses to avoid user enumeration, and only sends Supabase recovery links.

send-payout-override-notification.internalGuard: Validates the caller JWT with auth.getUser, requires admin/management, and requires payload actorId to match the authenticated user before any service-role reads.

send-staffing-email.internalGuard: Gateway JWT is disabled so browser CORS preflight reaches the shared HTTP wrapper. Runtime auth accepts service-role bearer/apikey for automation, otherwise requireAdminOrManagement validates the caller JWT and requires admin/management before any staffing send.

send-tour-availability.internalGuard: Uses the shared HTTP wrapper, bounded JSON parsing, and shared admin/management role guard before signing documents or sending email/WhatsApp availability requests.

send-warehouse-message.internalGuard: Uses the shared HTTP wrapper, bounded JSON parsing, and shared admin/management role guard; also requires the caller profile to have a WAHA endpoint before sending warehouse WhatsApp messages.

set-job-preventive-resource.internalGuard: ALLOWED_ROLES set restricts callers to admin/management/logistics.

staffing-click.internalGuard: Opaque per-invitation action token has durable ingress and per-link rate limits, then is validated against the campaign before any state transition.

staffing-orchestrator.internalGuard: Gateway JWT is disabled for browser CORS and service tick calls. Tick requires service-role; user actions resolve the JWT, load profiles.role/department, and enforce campaign department authorization before mutating campaign state.

staffing-sweeper.internalGuard: pg_cron/service-role campaign sweep; requireServiceRoleRequest validates bearer/apikey before ticking campaigns.

submit-public-artist-form.internalGuard: Festival artist form submissions have durable ingress and token-scoped rate limits before persisting the submission.

sync-flex-crew-for-job.internalGuard: Uses requireAdminOrManagement before reconciling desired assignments with Flex crew line items.

system-health.internalGuard: Requires an authenticated admin/management caller; redacts internal errors and records a security audit entry. Liveness moved to the unauthenticated `health` function.

tech-calendar-ics.internalGuard: Per-technician calendar feed token embedded in the subscription URL; guarded by durable ingress and token/client scoped hourly rate limits.

tour-guest-document-url.internalGuard: Tour guest document signing has durable ingress and token/document scoped rate limits before issuing a scoped, time-limited document URL.

upload-public-artist-rider.internalGuard: Festival artist form uploads have a durable ingress bucket plus a token-scoped rate limit before storage writes.

wallboard-auth.internalGuard: Exchanges WALLBOARD_SHARED_TOKEN for a scoped wallboard JWT; fails closed when the shared secret is unset.

wallboard-feed.internalGuard: Validates a signed wallboard JWT or shared token before returning feed data.

health.internalGuard: Liveness/readiness probe. Returns only static status and a timestamp; performs no database or business queries.
